---
name: Bug Report
about: NetFixer crashed, gave wrong results, or a fix didn't work
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Opened NetFixer
2. Clicked 'Scan Network'
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## System Info
- **Windows Version:** (e.g. Windows 11 23H2, Windows 10 22H2)
- **NetFixer Version:** v1.0.0
- **Network Type:** WiFi / Ethernet / USB Tethering

## Screenshots
If applicable, paste a screenshot of the issue card or error.

## Additional Context
Any other info — VPN, antivirus, recent Windows Update, etc.
